name: vendor.myndhyve.campaign-sequence-integration
description: MyndHyve campaign-sequence integration nodes — email, sms, webhook. Companion pack to vendor.myndhyve.campaign-sequence (which carries the 3 pure-control nodes). Declares `host.campaignMessaging` peerDependency for the email + sms surface (matching MyndHyve's EmailSMSAdapterService shape); webhook is self-contained via Node 20 fetch + bundled HMAC signature.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Sequence Email
nodes.description: Sends a sequence email through the host's configured email adapter (ctx.campaignMessaging.sendEmail). Validates step.subject is present; delegates delivery to the host. Non-retryable on validation failure; retryable on adapter errors.

nodes.label: Sequence SMS
nodes.description: Sends a sequence SMS through the host's configured SMS adapter (ctx.campaignMessaging.sendSms). Validates step.smsBody is present; delegates delivery to the host. Non-retryable on validation failure; retryable on adapter errors.

nodes.label: Sequence Webhook
nodes.description: Delivers a sequence webhook with an HMAC-SHA256 signature. Self-contained — uses Node 20 fetch + node:crypto for signing; no host capability required beyond the standard runtime. Validates URL scheme + rejects private/reserved IPv4 ranges (SSRF defense). Configurable secret + method + headers + body payload.
